questions.question: Design a deep learning network architecture for classifying textual documents into two categories, such as spam vs. non-spam emails or positive vs. negative reviews. Consider the characteristics of natural language processing and the requirements of the classification task. Explain the choice of each layer and its parameters.

Implement a deep learning network using a deep learning framework of your choice (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) to classify textual documents into multiple categories. Train the network on a dataset of your choice and evaluate its performance using metrics such as accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score. Discuss the results and potential areas for improvement.

Compare and contrast the performance of different deep learning architectures (e.g., CNN, LSTM, Transformers) for classifying textual documents. Provide evidence from your own experiments or a literature review to support your arguments. Discuss the advantages and disadvantages of each architecture and their suitability for specific tasks.
